description: Production-grade Spring Boot 3.x observability dashboard — API, JVM, JDBC, System, Logs (Loki)

targets.expr: sum by(method, uri)(http_server_requests_seconds_sum{application="$app_name",instance=~"$instance", uri!="/actuator/prometheus"}) / sum by(method, uri)(http_server_requests_seconds_count{application="$app_name",instance=~"$instance", uri!="/actuator/prometheus"})

sum by(uri) (http_server_requests_seconds_count{application="$app_name",instance=~"$instance", status=~"2.*", uri!="/actuator/prometheus"}) / sum by(uri) (http_server_requests_seconds_count{application="$app_name",instance=~"$instance", uri!="/actuator/prometheus"})

sum by(uri) (http_server_requests_seconds_count{application="$app_name",instance=~"$instance", status=~"5.*", uri!="/actuator/prometheus"}) / sum by(uri) (http_server_requests_seconds_count{application="$app_name",instance=~"$instance", uri!="/actuator/prometheus"})

panels.title: Requests Per Sec by Status Code
JVM Memory Pools (Eden / Survivor / Old Gen / Metaspace)

list.description: Filter logs by keyword or trace_id
list.label: Log Keyword / trace_id
list.name: log_keyword

title: Monitoring Observability Dashboard - Sakcode
